title: WKA-002 While I was watching adult videos, my headphones suddenly came off and naughty sounds started leaking out. The older sister who heard the sound came over and saw my erect penis, and I was playd as much as I wanted by the three lustful sisters. - Haruka Makino
overview: I thought I was secretly watching adult videos and masturbating, but it seems that the headphone jack was loose, and the sound of the adult video was playing loudly throughout the room. By the time I noticed, the ladies were already crowding around my erect penis...
